summary_en: 522,000 shares (cumulative) acquired for ¥938.1M as of 31 May 2026 under authorization of 1.5M shares (3.4% S/O) and ¥2.5B limit through 30 Sep 2026. May acquisition: 216,800 shares for ¥384.8M via open-market purchase on Tokyo Stock Exchange.
title_en: Notice Regarding Status of Acquisition of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: Osaki Electric Co., Ltd. filed a buyback progress report on 1 June 2026 disclosing cumulative acquisitions as of 31 May 2026. The board authorized a buyback program on 19 February 2026 for up to 1.5 million shares (3.4% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) with a budget ceiling of ¥2.5 billion, executable through 30 September 2026 via open-market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. As of 31 May 2026, the company had cumulatively acquired 522,000 shares for ¥938.1 million. In May alone (1–31 May), 216,800 shares were purchased for ¥384.8 million at an average price of approximately ¥1,774 per share. The program represents approximately 35% consumption of the authorized share count and 37.5% of the ¥2.5 billion budget.
